description: You are a GIS Lead at a regional planning authority. Configure a dual-workspace geospatial data portal in GeoServer (http://localhost:8080/geoserver/web/, admin / Admin123!). The portal must include an 'infrastructure' workspace (URI: http://infrastructure.authority.gov/gis) and an 'environment' workspace (URI: http://environment.authority.gov/gis), both connected to the PostGIS database at gs-postgis:5432/gis (geoserver/geoserver123) via datastores 'infra_data' and 'env_data' respectively. Publish 'ne_populated_places' as the 'settlements' layer in the infrastructure workspace and 'ne_rivers' as the 'waterways' layer in the environment workspace. Apply a custom SLD style 'settlement_marker' (orange #FFA500 circle, size 8) as the default for settlements and 'waterway_line' (blue #0080FF line, width 2) as the default for waterways. Both layers should be included in a global layer group named 'regional_portal'.
